name: DevBox
postCreateCommand: cd /tmp && curl -O https://downloads.rclone.org/rclone-current-linux-amd64.zip && unzip rclone-current-linux-amd64.zip && mkdir -p ~/.local/bin && cp rclone-*/rclone ~/.local/bin/ && chmod +x ~/.local/bin/rclone && mkdir -p ~/.config/rclone && [ -f /workspaces/devbox/.devcontainer/rclone.conf ] && cp /workspaces/devbox/.devcontainer/rclone.conf ~/.config/rclone/rclone.conf || true && mkdir -p ~/projects && echo "alias gsave='~/.local/bin/rclone sync ~/projects filesystem:devbox-projects'" >> ~/.bashrc
